UserPromptSubmit.matcher: prototype|build a|create a screen|listing screen|detail screen|design a|mock ?up|wireframe

hooks.command: echo 'IMPORTANT REMINDERS FOR THIS REQUEST: (1) If this asks to BUILD or CREATE a prototype/screen, you MUST invoke the design-advisory skill via the Skill tool BEFORE doing anything else — do not scan files or start building; design-advisory invokes the prototyping skill itself. If it MODIFIES an existing prototype, read that prototype context.md then use the prototyping skill. (2) NEVER scan prototypes/ unless the user names a prototype. (3) The stack manifest (stack-templates/<stack>/manifest/) is the source of truth for components, variants, tokens, and icons.'

node -e "try{const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('.pdk/requests.json')){const q=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.pdk/requests.json','utf8'));const n=(Array.isArray(q)?q:[]).filter(r=>r.status==='pending').length;if(n>0)console.log(n+' catalogue order(s) waiting - run /orders to process them.')}}catch(e){}"
